narrative:
Hicksville Village C (precinct in Defiance County) has 670 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.9 percentage points.
